data.body: APPROVED PLAN executing (operator: build instrumentation-extension + advisory-first R1/R3/R4; E2/E3 batch evals PERMANENTLY REJECTED on cost; ACs must be session-completable, no dogfood wait). DONE: R2 closed+signed. E6 #787 landing (a880 close pending; order-shuffle FAIL kappa=0.55 recorded). Mining verdict: ~$0 (plan-v3 history starved: 4 clean baselines vs ~200; version bump stranded 223 plan-v2 on wrong side of ADR-0036). BUILT: instrumentation-extension story d8a5-7a66 (lexical-freudian-blueshark) — criterion_effectiveness.py standing per-criterion recorder (--record/--backfill/--report, auto-includes new criteria, sidecar-native, $0), plan PASSED+signed, claimed, metrics over 37k firings/564 tickets committed, promotion-gate protocol doc'd; pushed Gerrit #798 awaiting votes -> self-lands+closes. NEXT (sequential, after #798 merges): delegate R1(59b7)->R3(3a27)->R4(03a9) advisory-first re-plans (ship advisory + wire to criterion_effectiveness + deterministic sanity fixture + documented dogfood promotion gate; ACs session-completable; drop R4 depends_on d125; each shares criteria_routing.json so sequence). THEN epic cleanup: close-defer E2(d125)+E3(def5) [batch eval rejected], reconcile epic AC#1 (descoped kappa), E5/R5 stay deferred (R5 kernel change out of scope), close epic 6982.
